_comment: Machine source of truth for the per-pod bug scan. Each entry is ONE scan task (its own cron job + its own subagent). 'paths' and 'exclude' are fnmatch globs matched against repo-relative paths in the target repo (brave-core); note '*' matches '/' too, so 'components/foo/*' matches nested files. Regenerate PODS.md after editing: python3 prepare-scan.py --sync-doc. Verified against brave-browser/src/brave on master.

pods.label: AI Chat / Leo
pods.focus: Conversation state lifetime, streaming response handling, untrusted model/server output parsing, tab-content extraction, feature-flag gating.

pods.label: Wallet — Ethereum/EVM
pods.focus: EVM tx construction/signing, ABI decode bounds, nonce/gas math integer over/underflow, RPC response parsing, allowance handling.

pods.label: Wallet — Solana
pods.focus: Instruction/message compilation bounds, account-meta indexing, signature/serialization correctness, untrusted RPC parsing.

pods.label: Wallet — Bitcoin
pods.focus: UTXO selection/amount math over/underflow, PSBT/tx serialization bounds, key derivation, block-tracker lifetime.

pods.label: Wallet — Zcash
pods.focus: Shielded/transparent tx math, orchard/librustzcash FFI boundary validation, serialization bounds, amount over/underflow.

pods.label: Wallet — Cardano/Polkadot/Filecoin/internal
pods.focus: Chain-specific tx/amount math, serialization bounds, FFI/internal boundary validation, key handling.

pods.label: Wallet — Keyring / key management
pods.focus: Seed/private-key lifetime and zeroing, mnemonic handling, keyring migration correctness, unlock/lock state, password handling.

pods.label: Wallet — Core services & UI
pods.focus: Service/factory object lifetime, mojo/IPC validation of renderer-supplied values, asset/price parsing, permission checks, WeakPtr use-after-invalidate.

pods.label: Shields (content settings, blocking core)
pods.focus: Content-settings resolution correctness, per-site rule application, cross-thread access to shields state, null pref/host-content-settings reads.

pods.label: Adblock component
pods.focus: Filter-list provider lifetime, component/DAT loading and parsing bounds, engine update races, untrusted rule/resource parsing.

pods.label: Fingerprinting protection (farbling)
pods.focus: Farbling seed derivation, script injection into untrusted frames, per-origin randomization consistency, renderer-side value validation.

pods.label: Sync
pods.focus: Sync record encode/decode of untrusted server data, crypto/nudge handling, device-info lifetime, cross-sequence access, migration correctness.

pods.label: VPN
pods.focus: Connection state machine correctness, credential/subscription handling, region-list parsing of server data, connection-observer lifetime.

pods.label: Talk
pods.focus: Talk integration/launch flow, message-handler input validation, native-JS bridge value validation.

pods.label: Talk Premium / SKUs entitlement
pods.focus: SKU/entitlement verification that gates Talk & VPN premium, credential/order-state parsing of server responses, expiry math, replay/forgery of entitlement state.

pods.label: News
pods.focus: Feed/publisher parsing of untrusted network data, image/URL handling, feed-controller lifetime, cross-thread feed updates.

pods.label: Sidebar
pods.focus: Sidebar item model lifetime vs UI, tab/browser observer teardown, null browser/webcontents reads, item ordering correctness.

pods.label: Speedreader
pods.focus: Distillation of untrusted page content, throttle/delegate lifetime, renderer boundary validation, null document reads.

pods.label: Tor
pods.focus: Tor process/launcher lifetime, control-port parsing, proxy config correctness, profile teardown, leaking identifiers across sessions.

pods.label: Wayback Machine
pods.focus: Wayback API response parsing, infobar/delegate lifetime vs webcontents, null response handling, URL validation.

pods.label: Web Discovery
pods.focus: Untrusted page/content extraction and reporting, anonymization/hashing correctness, scheduler/observer lifetime, PII leakage in payloads.

pods.label: Email Aliases
pods.focus: Alias service state, server-response parsing, auth/session handling, mojo/IPC validation, alias-list lifetime.
